attr.title: Chrono Trigger
attr.desc: The Android version of Chrono Trigger, run natively via the ct_nx loader (a sibling of the Switch port). cocos2d-x engine on SDL2 + GLES2.
attr.inst: You must supply the game from your own legally-owned Chrono Trigger Android APK (v2.1.5). Copy lib/arm64-v8a/libchrono.so, lib/arm64-v8a/libc++_shared.so and the whole assets/ folder into ports/ct/.
